series_metadata.series_description: The Provider Network Management (PNM) module will store and process data associated with provider management, screening, credentialing, and enrollment. Project records will be available in paper and machine readable formats.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copies of all project deliverables, artifacts, training materials and other non-system records scanned into a machine readable format. Paper copies not scanned shall be kept and ; Electronic: Three historical versions and one current version of machine readable formats of all project deliverables, artifacts, training materials, and other non-system records should be maintained at any point of time, or contract terminates
